meta.tagline: Float through a story. Discover your inner capybara.
meta.ogTitle: What Capybara Are You? A Cozy 5-Question Personality Quiz
meta.ogDescription: A non-linear personality quiz with a capybara mascot. Drift through 5 cozy questions and meet your inner capy.

ui.imageReady: Image saved — open the app and add it to your story.
ui.footer: Made with warm water and patience.
ui.shareText: I'm a {archetype}! What capybara are you?
ui.historyEmpty: No results yet. Take the quiz to see your inner capybara.

q_intro.prompt: It's a slow afternoon. The water is just right. What pulls you in?

choice.a: A long, quiet soak — nothing on the schedule.
choice.b: Wandering somewhere new — let's see what's out there.
choice.c: Friends are gathering — the more, the warmer.
choice.d: I'll come alive after the sun goes down.

q_morning.prompt: How does your perfect morning unfold?

choice.a: Slowly. Hot bath, deep breaths, no thoughts.
choice.b: With a bowl of fruit and good crunchy snacks.
choice.c: A gentle stretch in the sun, no rush.

q_adventure.prompt: Where do your paws want to wander?

choice.a: Deep into a misty forest, alone with the trees.
choice.b: Down a fast river — bring the splash.
choice.c: A long mountain trail with one cozy lookout.

q_social.prompt: The gathering is on. What's your role?

choice.a: Host the whole thing — snacks, music, hugs.
choice.b: Quiet corner storyteller, drawing people in.
choice.c: Honestly? I'd rather slip away to the water.

q_night.prompt: Past midnight. The world is asleep. What now?

choice.a: Stargazing alone, just me and the sky.
choice.c: Cozy movie marathon under a blanket pile.

choice.a: Steaming hot spring, eyes closed, mind drifting.
choice.b: A lazy river — nowhere to be, all day.
choice.c: A splash zone — friends, laughter, chaos.

choice.a: A small, trusted circle — the same warm faces.
choice.b: Everyone. The more capys, the better.
choice.c: Just me, thanks. Solitude is the snack.

choice.a: Fresh fruit, herbs, a sprig of something green.
choice.b: A warm, hearty bowl of comfort.
choice.c: A midnight cheese plate, lit by candle.

q_final.prompt: One last decision before the day closes.

choice.a: Drift to sleep watching the stars.
choice.b: One more shared laugh with friends.
choice.c: A final reflective soak — alone with thoughts.
choice.d: One more daring dive before bed.

zen-master.name: The Zen Master
zen-master.description: You are stillness on four paws. Storms pass; you keep floating. People drift toward your calm.

foodie-lounger.name: The Foodie Lounger
foodie-lounger.description: Life is a series of cozy snacks between excellent naps. You taste the world slowly and on purpose.

adventure-seeker.name: The Adventure Seeker
adventure-seeker.description: There's a trail, and you've already started walking. Restless, curious, the first one in the river.

social-bather.name: The Social Bather
social-bather.description: The party is wherever you are. You collect friends like warm stones — easy, generous, glowing.

lone-floater.name: The Lone Floater
lone-floater.description: Solitude is a feature, not a bug. You think best in still water and rarely need an audience.

hot-spring-sage.name: The Hot Spring Sage
hot-spring-sage.description: Warm water, warmer wisdom. People come to you with tangled thoughts and leave with something clearer.

sunbather.name: The Sunbather
sunbather.description: Optimism wrapped in a soft, warm pelt. You find the bright patch and you stay there.

night-owl.name: The Night Owl Capy
night-owl.description: Your best ideas show up after midnight. You make the small hours feel like a private kingdom.
